printed.name: Hanging Back
printed.setup: Hanging, arms straight, hands holding top crossbars of Cadillac, legs straight, hips externally rotated, feet placed on trapeze, feet dorsiflexed and hooked behind springs

movement.exhale: Roll pelvis and spine up to horizontal line, plantarflexing feet
movement.inhale: Reach crown of head to Mat, extending spine

cues: Reach tailbone to Mat when hanging in start position
Maximize extension in upper and mid back prior to lumbar extension and hip extension
Avoid excessive extension of cervical spine
